Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: Medicare Part D Plan Characteristics (2007-2014) │ October 2021 │ V 1.4 317 

PRE_ICL_INNPP_COINS_AVG_1M 

LABEL: Pre-ICL In-Network Non-Preferred Pharmacy Average Expected Coinsurance for 1-month supply 

DESCRIPTION: This variable identifies the average expected cost-sharing amount in dollars for beneficiary co-
insurance for a 1-month supply of the drugs on this tier, using an in-network non-preferred preferred
